artifact_blurb: This page acts as the title header for Appendix B, specifically for the Plant PLC Listing section. It belongs to the PLC Hardware Evaluation document for the Howard F. Curren AWTP SCADA System and features logos for Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners.
